title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — Choosing certificate validity period
text:
kubeadm allows you to choose the validity period of CA and leaf certificates.
That can be done by using the
certificateValidityPeriod
and
caCertificateValidityPeriod
fields of the kubeadm configuration:
apiVersion
:
kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind
:
ClusterConfiguration
certificateValidityPeriod: 8760h # Default
:
365
days × 24 hours = 1 year
caCertificateValidityPeriod: 87600h # Default
:
365
days × 24 hours * 10 = 10 years
The values of the fields follow the accepted format for
Go's
time.Duration
values
, with the longest supported
unit being
h
(hours).
